evidence_text: 11.3.7.1 Computation of floor area, floor space ratio, yards, site coverage, impermeability, number of buildings on site and dwelling unit density must be based on the site width and area at the time of development, prior to any subdivision into individual freehold rowhouse parcels.
source_context: 11.3.7.1 Computation of floor area, floor space ratio, yards, site coverage, impermeability, number of buildings on site and dwelling unit density must be based on the site width and area at the time of development, prior to any subdivision into individual freehold rowhouse parcels.

evidence_text: 11.3.7.2 For the purpose of fee simple subdivision, the minimum site width and frontage for each freehold rowhouse parcel is 5.0 m.
source_context: 11.3.7.2 For the purpose of fee simple subdivision, the minimum site width and frontage for each freehold rowhouse parcel is 5.0 m.

evidence_text: 11.3.8 Laneway House
source_context: 11.3.8 Laneway House

evidence_text: 11.3.8 Laneway House | 11.3.8.1 A laneway house is only permitted in combination with a single detached house, single detached house with secondary suite, or child day care facility, and only on a site that provides vehicular access from the rear of the site.
source_context: 11.3.8 Laneway House | 11.3.8.1 A laneway house is only permitted in combination with a single detached house, single detached house with secondary suite, or child day care facility, and only on a site that provides vehicular access from the rear of the site.

evidence_text: 11.3.8 Laneway House | 11.3.8.2 The floor area for a laneway house must not exceed the lesser of:
source_context: 11.3.8 Laneway House | 11.3.8.2 The floor area for a laneway house must not exceed the lesser of:

evidence_text: 11.3.8.2 The floor area for a laneway house must not exceed the lesser of: | (a) 0.25 multiplied by the site area; and
source_context: 11.3.8.2 The floor area for a laneway house must not exceed the lesser of: | (a) 0.25 multiplied by the site area; and

evidence_text: 11.3.8.2 The floor area for a laneway house must not exceed the lesser of: | (b) 186 sq. m .
source_context: 11.3.8.2 The floor area for a laneway house must not exceed the lesser of: | (b) 186 sq. m .

evidence_text: (a) 0.25 multiplied by the site area; and
source_context: (a) 0.25 multiplied by the site area; and

evidence_text: 11.3.8.3 The minimum site width for a laneway house is 9.8 m, except that the Director of Planning may reduce the minimum site width if:
source_context: 11.3.8.3 The minimum site width for a laneway house is 9.8 m, except that the Director of Planning may reduce the minimum site width if:

evidence_text: (a) the site is at least 7.3 m in width; and
source_context: (a) the site is at least 7.3 m in width; and

evidence_text: (b) the Director of Planning considers massing, overlook and impact on neighbourhood privacy and all applicable Council policies and guidelines.
source_context: (b) the Director of Planning considers massing, overlook and impact on neighbourhood privacy and all applicable Council policies and guidelines.

evidence_text: 11.3.8.4 The building height for a laneway house must not exceed 8.5 m and 2 storeys.
source_context: 11.3.8.4 The building height for a laneway house must not exceed 8.5 m and 2 storeys.

evidence_text: 11.3.8.5 Despite the maximum permitted site coverage in an applicable district schedule, for a site with a laneway house, the maximum site coverage is 50% of the site area.
source_context: 11.3.8.5 Despite the maximum permitted site coverage in an applicable district schedule, for a site with a laneway house, the maximum site coverage is 50% of the site area.

evidence_text: 11.3.8.6 A laneway house must be at least:
source_context: 11.3.8.6 A laneway house must be at least:

evidence_text: 11.3.8.6 A laneway house must be at least: | (a) 4.9 m, measured across the width of the site, from the single detached house or single detached house with secondary suite on the site;
source_context: 11.3.8.6 A laneway house must be at least: | (a) 4.9 m, measured across the width of the site, from the single detached house or single detached house with secondary suite on the site;

evidence_text: 11.3.8.6 A laneway house must be at least: | (b) 0.9 m from the ultimate rear property line; and
source_context: 11.3.8.6 A laneway house must be at least: | (b) 0.9 m from the ultimate rear property line; and

evidence_text: (a) 4.9 m, measured across the width of the site, from the single detached house or single detached house with secondary suite on the site;
source_context: (a) 4.9 m, measured across the width of the site, from the single detached house or single detached house with secondary suite on the site;

evidence_text: (b) 0.9 m from the ultimate rear property line; and
source_context: (b) 0.9 m from the ultimate rear property line; and

evidence_text: (c) 1.2 m from each side property line, except that the Director of Planning may reduce this requirement for sites less than 10.1 m in width.
source_context: (c) 1.2 m from each side property line, except that the Director of Planning may reduce this requirement for sites less than 10.1 m in width.

evidence_text: 11.3.8.7 Except for a laneway house with no separate bedrooms, a laneway house must include:
source_context: 11.3.8.7 Except for a laneway house with no separate bedrooms, a laneway house must include:

evidence_text: (a) 1 main habitable room that is not a bedroom, with a minimum size of 16.7 sq. m and a minimum dimension of 2.1 m measured between finished wall surfaces; and
source_context: (a) 1 main habitable room that is not a bedroom, with a minimum size of 16.7 sq. m and a minimum dimension of 2.1 m measured between finished wall surfaces; and

evidence_text: (b) at least 1 bedroom with a minimum size of 8.4 sq. m and a minimum dimension of 2.1 m measured between finished wall surfaces.
source_context: (b) at least 1 bedroom with a minimum size of 8.4 sq. m and a minimum dimension of 2.1 m measured between finished wall surfaces.

evidence_text: 11.3.8.8 Computation of floor area for a laneway house must include:
source_context: 11.3.8.8 Computation of floor area for a laneway house must include:

evidence_text: (a) all floors, including earthen floor, measured to the extreme outer limits of the building;
source_context: (a) all floors, including earthen floor, measured to the extreme outer limits of the building;

evidence_text: (b) stairways, fire escapes, elevator shafts and other features that the Director of Planning considers similar, measured by their gross cross-sectional areas and included in the measurements for each floor at which they are located; and
source_context: (b) stairways, fire escapes, elevator shafts and other features that the Director of Planning considers similar, measured by their gross cross-sectional areas and included in the measurements for each floor at which they are located; and

evidence_text: (c) where the distance from a floor to the floor above or, where there is no floor above, to the top of the roof joists, exceeds 3.7 m, an amount equal to the area of the floor below the excess height.
source_context: (c) where the distance from a floor to the floor above or, where there is no floor above, to the top of the roof joists, exceeds 3.7 m, an amount equal to the area of the floor below the excess height.

evidence_text: 11.3.8.9 Computation of floor area for a laneway house must exclude:
source_context: 11.3.8.9 Computation of floor area for a laneway house must exclude:

evidence_text: 11.3.8.9 Computation of floor area for a laneway house must exclude: | (a) floors or portions thereof that are used for off-street parking, provided that each parking space is open on at least 2 sides and does not exceed 7.3 m in length;
source_context: 11.3.8.9 Computation of floor area for a laneway house must exclude: | (a) floors or portions thereof that are used for off-street parking, provided that each parking space is open on at least 2 sides and does not exceed 7.3 m in length;

evidence_text: 11.3.8.9 Computation of floor area for a laneway house must exclude: | (b) balconies and decks, and any other appurtenances that the Director of Planning considers similar to the foregoing, provided that the total area of these exclusions does not exceed 8% of the permitted floor area;
source_context: 11.3.8.9 Computation of floor area for a laneway house must exclude: | (b) balconies and decks, and any other appurtenances that the Director of Planning considers similar to the foregoing, provided that the total area of these exclusions does not exceed 8% of the permitted floor area;

evidence_text: (a) floors or portions thereof that are used for off-street parking, provided that each parking space is open on at least 2 sides and does not exceed 7.3 m in length;
source_context: (a) floors or portions thereof that are used for off-street parking, provided that each parking space is open on at least 2 sides and does not exceed 7.3 m in length;

evidence_text: (b) balconies and decks, and any other appurtenances that the Director of Planning considers similar to the foregoing, provided that the total area of these exclusions does not exceed 8% of the permitted floor area;
source_context: (b) balconies and decks, and any other appurtenances that the Director of Planning considers similar to the foregoing, provided that the total area of these exclusions does not exceed 8% of the permitted floor area;

evidence_text: (c) entries, porches and verandahs, if:
source_context: (c) entries, porches and verandahs, if:

evidence_text: (i) they are open or protected by guard rails that do not exceed the required minimum height,
source_context: (i) they are open or protected by guard rails that do not exceed the required minimum height,

evidence_text: (ii) the total area of these exclusions, when combined with the balcony and deck exclusions under section **11.3.8.9(b)** above, does not exceed 13% of the permitted floor area, and

source_context: (iii) the ceiling height, excluding roof structure, of the total area being excluded does not exceed

evidence_text: ## **Section 11**
source_context: ## **Section 11**

evidence_text: 11.3.8.11 A laneway house in combination with a child day care facility is only permitted if:
source_context: 11.3.8.11 A laneway house in combination with a child day care facility is only permitted if:

evidence_text: (a) there is only 1 laneway house and 1 child day care facility on the site; and
source_context: (a) there is only 1 laneway house and 1 child day care facility on the site; and

evidence_text: (b) the child day care facility is in a building that was converted from a single detached house or single detached house with secondary suite, and contains no other uses.
source_context: (b) the child day care facility is in a building that was converted from a single detached house or single detached house with secondary suite, and contains no other uses.

evidence_text: 11.3.8.4 The building height for a laneway house must not exceed 8.5 m and 2 storeys. | 11.3.8.5 Despite the maximum permitted site coverage in an applicable district schedule, for a site with a laneway house, the maximum site coverage is 50% of the site area.
